# Through the Looking Glass

Motivations: Irony (../../Features/Irony%200a85bc33ac144718937789d5db7d793c.md), Dark forest (../../Features/Dark%20forest%20181a3aae0f4b4056b6c28bb49e27978e.md), Dreamlike (../../Features/Dreamlike%20ce5b83035c894e0da2137f0584297c4d.md), Iconic (../../Features/Iconic%2010158e628ba280648510f4544487aab5.md), Journey - frequent new locations (../../Features/Journey%20-%20frequent%20new%20locations%201d458e628ba280c085bdf51e33d114a4.md), Stumbling upon stationary characters (../../Features/Stumbling%20upon%20stationary%20characters%201d458e628ba28045a765d8c37bf00e42.md), Temporal continuity (../../Features/Temporal%20continuity%201d458e628ba2808eb64cdd3f14410df6.md), Adventure (../../Features/Adventure%201d458e628ba28026830dfe3db74cba19.md), Isolation (../../Features/Isolation%20330cda5056f64459b8d0d46a66ed21a2.md), Surreal (../../Features/Surreal%20cee6644b68094859bf1b17c5e7fd25de.md)
Pacing: Continuous (../Pacing%20types/Continuous%20e187a8c9a0cf44aea652648d5970a0db.md)
Plot is driven by MC desire: False
Story scale: Full story (../Story%20scales/Full%20story%20faaea9bcaf0f43b5ae79dfa06b96be34.md)
Traversal reasons: Youthful free spirit (../Traversal%20reasons/Youthful%20free%20spirit%2095e2ad9b9e37430c963747260b0aab71.md)
Traversal types: Journey (../Traversal%20types/Journey%2049dd89633f684d91a8d2ed2cd9bdf09e.md)
Type: Book (../Inspiration%20types/Book%20e76b1047e9d44c01a00ccdeea97cd346.md)
Weighted Use: 22
Wonder: 5

The sequel to Alice in Wonderland.  It falls short of the first book, though it still has many inspired elements.

The first book has an [Intuitive continuity](../../Features/Intuitive%20continuity%2029458e628ba2809d980bf33a4949e9ea.md) which the second book lacks.
